tree.name: Kyshawn George
tree.tradeDescription: WAS traded Dillon Jones (#26 pick) and a 2024 2nd round draft pick (became Melvin Ajinça) to NYK for Kyshawn George (#24 pick)
tree.note: #24 overall pick, acquired from NYK on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 1st Round Pick (#26)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded Daniel Gafford to DAL for Richaun Holmes and 2024 1st (least favorable, became #26)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from Dallas in Daniel Gafford trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Daniel Gafford
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/CHI/BOS): WAS sent Troy Brown Jr. + cash to CHI, Moe Wagner to BOS. CHI sent Gafford + Hutchison to WAS. BOS sent Theis, Green, cash to CHI. CHI sent Kornet to BOS.

assetsGivenUp.name: Troy Brown Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: #15 overall pick by WAS in 2018 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Moritz Wagner
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (LAL/NOP/WAS): LAL sent AD to NOP. LAL sent Wagner, Bonga, J. Jones, 2022 2nd to WAS. WAS sent cash to NOP.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from LAL in Anthony Davis 3-team trade for cash. Sent to BOS in Gafford deal.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to NOP as part of 3-team AD trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#51)
assetsGivenUp.note: Sent to NYK along with Dillon Jones pick
